title: Randomize Phonk
description: A mod that recreates the experience of a YouTube phonk edit.
body:
# English 
## Randomizer Phonk

- This mod recreates the experience of a random TikTok or YouTube Shorts phonk edit.

- It triggers a cinematic "phonk" moment (randomly or with a key) that blasts a phonk track and flashes a skull on your screen.

- In **singleplayer**, it **freezes time**, stopping all mobs and physics. In **multiplayer**, it only freezes your camera and input, but the server keeps running normally.

- It's fully client-side and configurable.

**This mod was inspired by @TheGreenBit's tweet on X**, [THIS](https://x.com/TheTweetBit/status/1979187049203749007) , I know many others have already recreated it, but this is my own take on it. I hope you enjoy it!

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc978b3d844e5435cb003cdc59a1252feaf3ce00_0.webp)

![image2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/378d21cd4cef46c0e44e6bcbe7549ec42cf948aa.png)

# Español
## Randomizer Phonk

Este mod recrea la experiencia de un edit phonk aleatorio de TikTok o YouTube Shorts.

Activa un "momento phonk" cinemático (al azar o con una tecla) que pone una canción de phonk a todo volumen y te muestra una calavera en la pantalla.

En **singleplayer**, **congela el tiempo**, deteniendo a todos los mobs y la física. En **multiplayer**, solo congela tu cámara y controles, pero el servidor sigue funcionando con normalidad.

Es 100% de lado-cliente y configurable.

**Este mod esta inspirado del tweet de @TheGreenBit en X** [ESTE](https://x.com/TheTweetBit/status/1979187049203749007), se que ya hay varios que lo recrearon pero este fue a mi modo, espero te guste.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc978b3d844e5435cb003cdc59a1252feaf3ce00_0.webp)

![image2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/378d21cd4cef46c0e44e6bcbe7549ec42cf948aa.png)
